title: hymenasplenium distans
intro: Hymenasplenium distans is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae, commonly known as the filmy ferns. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hymenasplenium distans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
